title: Bushier Fragrance
description: A resource pack adding compatibility between Hecco's wonderful resource pack, Fragrant Flowers, and some other mods.
body:
A simple resource pack, aiming to add compatibility for some mods with Hecco's wonderfull resource pack, Fragrant Flowers. \
It adds some new models for some flowers that are missing from Hecco's resource pack as well.

You must use [Fragrant Flowers](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/flamboyant-flowers-the-new-3d-flowers/) (from Planet Minecraft) use this resource pack.  Place Fragrant Flowers below Bushier Fragrance in your resource pack list.  
And don't forget to follow Hecco if you like their work! You can find them on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Hecco) or [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/hecco/).  

![Every flower edited](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3354652595b5b0815c8d1c80024576ea28edb2d3.png)

- Compatibility with [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)'s new sunflower is already done. 
- Compatibility with [Just Dandy](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-dandy)'s fluffy dandelions. 
- Partial compatibility with the [Bushier Flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/bushier-flowers) mod.  

I highly recommand those mods even without any resource pack!

I plan to add compatibility with Hecco's mod, [Biome Tinted Flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-tinted-flowers), eventually.
